project_scope: StarVLA-based GenesisVLA engineering: core contracts, typed config, data transforms, runners, model frameworks, deployment, acceleration, and migration validation.

features.name: Claude-tested project-local Teamwork wrapper contract
Codex Manager session bootstrap and resume metadata
Claude-reviewed interactive GSD discuss report and Teamwork handoff smoke loop
GenesisVLA architecture RFC
GenesisVLA coding and testing standards
Independent GenesisVLA check, type, and PR gates
RawSample, BatchSample, ModelInput, FrameworkOutput, and action contract types
features.evidence: GVLA-M1-ACCEPT-001 local feature acceptance: Architecture APPROVE in coordination/reports/GVLA-M1-ACCEPT-001/owner-architecture.md and Quality APPROVE in coordination/reports/GVLA-M1-ACCEPT-001/owner-quality.md. Evidence covers RawSample, BatchSample, ModelInput, FrameworkOutput, ActionChunk, ActionMask, and ActionSpace through tests/core/test_raw_sample.py, tests/core/test_framework_contract.py, tests/core/test_action.py, and the project-local wrapper bash scripts/quality/genesis_check_project_local.sh PASS.

features.name: Framework, runner, and policy protocols
features.evidence: GVLA-M1-ACCEPT-001 local feature acceptance: Architecture APPROVE in coordination/reports/GVLA-M1-ACCEPT-001/owner-architecture.md and Quality APPROVE in coordination/reports/GVLA-M1-ACCEPT-001/owner-quality.md. Evidence covers FrameworkProtocol, RunnerProtocol, and PolicyProtocol through tests/core/test_protocol_contracts.py with explicit Protocol annotations and the project-local wrapper bash scripts/quality/genesis_check_project_local.sh PASS.

features.name: Typed registry, dataclass config, OmegaConf bridge, and resolved config export
